personal.name: Emmanuel Chukwuebuka Osuagwu
personal.title: Full Stack Developer | Building High-Impact Digital Products

about.bio: I help businesses and startups turn their ideas into high-performing, scalable digital products. With over 5 years of experience in full-stack development, I don't just write code—I build solutions that drive user engagement and business growth. My approach combines technical excellence with a deep understanding of user experience.
focus: User-centric UI/UX design for better retention

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Lead Software Engineer responsible for designing and implementing end-to-end web solutions. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality products on time. Use modern frameworks and backend tools to build scalable applications.
achievements: Built a real-time dashboard for the learning management system, increasing user engagement by 35%
Contributed to API documentation and testing
Delivered the project within the agreed timeline

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Lead the development of flagship web applications, managing a team of 3 developers. Architect scalable solutions using modern JavaScript frameworks. Conduct code reviews, optimize performance, and ensure best practices.
achievements: Built a real-time dashboard, increasing user engagement by 35%
Led the launch of 3 major features, contributing to a 25% increase in user retention
Established CI/CD pipelines that improved deployment speed and reliability

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Worked with cross-functional teams to deliver web and mobile applications for various clients. Developed RESTful APIs, integrated third-party services, and implemented responsive UIs.

Improved application performance by an average of 22% through code optimization
Mentored junior developers and led code review sessions
